headline: PASS YOUR WDA INSPECTION
subheading: The MHRA-ready route to wholesale authorisation: Responsible Person, GDP quality system and proven cold chain.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking UK pharmaceutical wholesale authorisation and Good Distribution Practice. A pristine, softly blurred medicine distribution warehouse forms the deep navy background, with orderly rows of neutral storage racks receding into shadow. In the conceptual midground, a glowing teal-and-cyan holographic checklist of abstract approval ticks floats above a stylised official seal of approval rendered as a luminous cyan ribbon-and-medallion motif, suggesting a granted licence. A translucent temperature-monitoring line graph arcs across the scene in cyan, holding steady within an in-range band marked by a single fresh-green accent glow, symbolising a validated, compliant cold chain. Subtle abstract document layers and a shield form drift in soft focus, conveying a quality management system and inspection readiness. Cool teal and cyan light washes over precise stainless-steel edges against authoritative deep-navy tones, with faint motes catching premium directional light. The mood is precise, trustworthy and high-end. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
